overlay_notes: Costinot-Werning optimal robot tax: 2.7% ad-valorem × auto_cost 30% → automation_tax_rate = 0.0081 of the saved compensation bill
Compute-pool parity tax: effective rate 0.27 (Windfall capital ETR 26.7%) vs the 0.05 post-TCJA status quo
SWF: the government holds a 20% equity share of after-corporate-tax automation profit — revenue scales automatically with the shock (the insurance property)

grounding.debt_stock: ≈ 3.1 extra years of the FY2025 federal deficit — on top of what CBO already projects
grounding.fed_deficit_flow: ≈ 0.8× the entire FY2024 defense budget, every year — on top of what CBO already projects
grounding.real_gdp: ≈ 25.1 years of normal (~2%/yr) real growth, arriving all at once
grounding.revenue_flow: ≈ 4.3 full years of federal individual income-tax receipts
grounding.state_flow: ≈ 0.6× what all states spend on K-12 schools, every year
